meaning: adj.直立的,竖立的,笔直的vt.盖,使竖立,使直立,树立,建立vi.[生理]勃起
examples: They plan to erect an apartment house on that property.
Your job, as captain of your soul, is to erect dams to keep these passions in check.
Police had to erect barriers to keep crowds back.
For contractors itching to erect some buildings, the best opportunities last year were in multi-family residential.
"It's wrong to erect a building of that size in that space, " he says.
